title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week brought important platform stability improvements and enhanced automation capabilities. We fixed licensing issues that could cause service interruptions and improved how OpsPal processes guidance, making the platform more reliable for your daily RevOps workflows.

entries.headline: Better guidance recommendations based on your workflow patterns
Resolved licensing issues that could interrupt your work
details: License renewals now happen smoothly without service disruptions
You'll get clear warnings before any license expires so you can renew on time
